instruction: Plan course selection for next semester. Check whether your GPA (2.75) meets the 2.5 minimum for advanced courses, and verify you have completed at least 3 modules in your current courses (prerequisite progress). If your GPA is 2.5 or above AND you have 3+ completed modules, submit "course_plan.pdf" for your next unsubmitted assignment. If either condition is not met, mark all announcements as read to confirm you have reviewed the requirements.
